rulings.Case Title: YAKOV KURNOVSKIY VS. TJOMAN SUGIONO BUDITASLIM ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Sep 13, 2019 line 1. Plaintiff'S Motion To Enforce Judgment GRANTED. Plaintiff sustained its burden to show that Defendant breached the stipulation by failing to vacate the premises on time. Pursuant to September 6, 2019 Defendant's opposition was due on September 11, 2019. No opposition filed. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: CHENG H CHAN VS. DEREK KONG ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion Of Defendants For Attorney'S Fees And Costs
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Sep 13, 2019 line 2. DEFENDANT DEREK KONG, XUEYING DU Notice Of Motion And Motion Of Defendants For Attorney'S Fees And Costs DENIED. Moving party fails to provide admissible evidence regarding existence of a contract upon which the claim for fees is based. The only reference to the contract is via Plaintiff's Complaint. Complaint alleges in paragraph 6(e) that "a copy of the written agreement…is attached and labeled Exhibit 1." Defendant states in the Answer that "Defendant claims the following statement of the Complaint are false: 6." Defendant does not introduce the Lease in any other way for the purposes of this motion. Defendant further fails to cite any authority in the Points and Authorities for the proposition that "estimated" fees without contemporaneous records are recoverable. While the fees may be recoverable, a contract and appropriate authorities have to be provided to the Court. Request for costs in the amount of $374 is granted. While Defendant does not cite the appropriate section of CCP 1033.5, Defendant cites CCP 1032 and Plaintiff filed no opposition. Defendant to prepare Order and Judgment. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: JACKLYN JORDAN REZAI VS. LIUDMILA LYANNAYA ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Sep 13, 2019 line 3. DEFENDANT KYLE CHIDESTER, CHRISTOPHER PAPE, BLAISE MARTIN MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT OFF CALENDAR, per request of the moving party. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: LIE WOLFF VS. DARIN C. LITTLE ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Sep 13, 2019 line 4. DEFENDANT DARIN LITTLE DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT OVERRULED in part and Hearing Required in part. Demurrer is overruled as to the argument regarding the date of termination. Hearing Required to address the availability of relative move-in and compliance with declaration requirements. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: PAUL S NOUNOU VS. ANDREW LESKO ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Sep 13, 2019 line 5. DEFENDANT ANDREW LESKO, TARA JUELL DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT OVERRULED, 5 days to answer. A cause of action for unlawful detainer is sufficiently stated. Plaintiff's reasonable interpretation of the operative contract controls for the purposes of the demurrer. Any factual disputes regarding party's relationship and the contract cannot be resolved at this stage of the litigation. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: DAVID ESLER VS. MAYA MORISHITA ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Sep 13, 2019 line 6. DEFENDANT MAYA MORISHITA DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT OFF CALENDAR per request of the moving party. = (501/CFH)
